eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Arizona; at 02:14 PM ON JAN 30, 2026 Effective until 10:14 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Yavapai County. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Yavapai County Sheriff is looking for John Trout last seen in Chino Valley driving a 1956 2 door Chevy with AZ License Plate YSE8. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
